rulings.Case Title: JUAN CRUZ HINOJOSA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition And Production Of Documents By Defendant Hoffman New Yorker, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 24, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition and production of documents by defendant Hoffman/New Yorker, Inc.: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am, not 9:00am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 24, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Union Pacific Railroad Company¿s motion for protective is continued to November 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LEONILA MORTENSEN, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Deft Union Pacific Railroad Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition, And To Extend The Close Of Discovery With Respect To Union Pacific Railroad Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 24, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Union Pacific Railroad Co. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition, and to extend close of discovery with respect to Union Pacific Railroad Co. is continued to November 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
